script_text: Here's a trick to help you read.
voice_direction: Warm, calm kindergarten teacher voice. Short and inviting.

script_text: Put your finger under the first word. Then slide it to the right as you read.
voice_direction: Warm, calm kindergarten teacher voice. Demonstrative. Natural pauses between the two sentences.

script_text: Your finger helps your eyes know where to go.
voice_direction: Warm, calm kindergarten teacher voice. Short reassuring tone.
